creator: fgorter@gmail.com
text:
Just some added info to the missing distcache server:

ping -c 4 distcache.us-west.freebsd.org
PING pkg0.isc.freebsd.org (149.20.1.201): 56 data bytes
76 bytes from 173.167.56.62: Destination Host Unreachable
Vr HL TOS  Len   ID Flg  off TTL Pro  cks      Src      Dst
 4  5  00 0054 8f7a   0 0000  2e  01 a469 192.168.1.64  149.20.1.201 


--- pkg0.isc.freebsd.org ping statistics ---
4 packets transmitted, 0 packets received, 100.0% packet loss

Are the admins aware this server is offline/missing?
